CustomField.description: Sum of Form_Question_Catalog__c.Weight__c for catalog entries referenced by this section's Form_Question bindings. Denormalized for read perf (matches the snapshot architecture pattern — see docs/snapshot-v2.md). Populated by the snapshot writer / catalog backfill batch; may be null in templates where Scoring_Enabled__c is off or the field hasn't been backfilled yet.
CustomField.label: Max Score
